overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy, foggy cyberpunk city at night. The camera moves along an elevated highway shoulder with futuristic neon-lit skyscrapers visible across a lower district on the right, featuring heavy atmospheric effects and artificial lighting typical of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway shoulder overlooking neon-lit downtown district

events.description: camera settles into steady forward walking rhythm along the roadside
passing a streetlight pole that temporarily obscures the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated highway shoulder, observing the neon-lit skyline across the lower district

entered.detail: tall futuristic buildings with cyan and yellow neon signage and holographic advertisements visible across the lower district
multi-lane elevated highway with moving vehicle light trails and red tail lights
tall modern streetlight with warm orange glow illuminating the falling rain
metal safety barrier with reflective strips separating the walkway from the drop-off to the lower level

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night walk along an elevated highway shoulder. To the left, traffic moves along the highway as light trails, while to the right, a cluster of futuristic skyscrapers glows with cyan and yellow neon signs across a lower district. The camera passes streetlights that cast warm pools of light on the wet asphalt, with heavy fog obscuring the distant skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway verge with overgrown vegetation and distant neon glow

events.description: dry grass and vegetation becomes prominent along the right roadside
passing under a bright streetlight creates lens flare and intense illumination of rain particles

agents.ego_description: continuing along the roadside path, moving past patches of dry vegetation while maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: overgrown brown vegetation and weeds lining the roadside edge
diffused glowing lights from structures deep in the fog ahead

segments.scene_description: As the walk continues, the prominent neon skyscrapers recede behind the camera, replaced by overgrown dry grass patches along the roadside. The highway traffic remains visible as distant light trails to the left. The camera passes through pools of warm streetlight illumination that highlight the heavy rainfall, while mysterious diffused lights glow through the fog ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: fog-shrouded highway approach with distant illuminated structures

events.description: visibility decreases as fog density increases, obscuring distant details
approaching a cluster of bright lights visible through the heavy fog ahead

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the foggy section, approaching distant illuminated structures barely visible through the haze

entered.detail: tall dark structure barely visible through heavy fog with dim illuminated windows
illuminated billboards and signs floating in the fog above the highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves deeper into a heavily fog-shrouded area where visibility is significantly reduced. The dry vegetation falls behind as the camera approaches a large fog-shrouded building with dim lights visible ahead. Streetlights continue to line the path, their glow diffused by the dense fog and rain, while illuminated signage hovers in the mist above the distant highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a rainy elevated highway that transitions from a vista of glowing neon skyscrapers into a dense, claustrophobic fog. It begins with the camera moving past warm streetlights on wet asphalt, while cyan and yellow neon signs illuminate a lower district to the right and traffic flows as light trails to the left. As the walk continues, the prominent skyscrapers recede behind the camera and the urban skyline is replaced by patches of overgrown dry grass along the roadside. The scene then shifts deeper into a heavily shrouded area where visibility drops significantly, causing the vegetation to fall away as the camera approaches a dim, fog-covered building. Finally, the path is defined only by the diffused glow of streetlights and hovering signage flickering through the thick mist and heavy rainfall.
